failure_movement.justification: Unknown cluster collapse predicted ~30, actual 23 (direction correct, magnitude off). Correct cluster growth 17→64 directionally implied. But wrong-answer cluster predicted to shrink by 1; actual grew 2→10. 8cf51dda predicted to flip pass; it failed in iter018. Passrate 0.64 below predicted 0.69–0.71.

trace_movement.justification: Token jump from iter017 ~1,023 to iter016 ~1,807 predicted accurately; actual iter018 total was 1,782.7 (very close). However, 8cf51dda trace claim (all 3 objectives present) contradicted by data: task failed with only 2 objectives found. Partial credit for strong token claim.

side_effects.justification: Token recovery to ~1,807 correctly predicted (actual 1,782.7). Wrong-answer rise risk correctly flagged in falsification; wrong cluster grew 2→10. But claimed low regression risk on non-list tasks was wrong given wrong-answer growth. Partially correct risk profile overall.
